scope.summary: Seeds each bounded driver query page with statement describe metadata so an empty result retains its select-list column names.
out_of_scope: Oracle live-database fixtures and VPD policy configuration.
Changing result rows, pagination semantics, or SQL guard behavior.

entry_points.name: OracleConnection bounded query page
entry_points.trace: collect_bounded_query_page converts QueryResult.columns describe metadata to the QueryPageBuilder constructor before rows are consumed.

entry_points.name: C7 zero-row columns fixture
entry_points.trace: query::tests::c7_a_zero_row_page_still_reports_its_columns now enforces CUSTOMER_ID and REGION on a page with zero rows.

limitations: Scoped offline verification passed: cargo fmt -p oraclemcp-db -- --check; cargo test -p oraclemcp-db --lib c7_a_zero_row_page_still_reports_its_columns -- --nocapture; cargo test -p oraclemcp-db --lib -- --nocapture (458 passed, one unrelated expected-failure skipped).
No live Oracle or VPD fixture is claimed; the covered seam is deterministic and uses the driver result metadata before row fetch.
